attributes.action: Fireworks (Rules & Regulations to be put in place to protect our animals)
attributes.additional_details:
After all the debates and signed petitions you have received regarding the problems fireworks cause to our animals & livestock.
 
We have got no where!!!
Why???

I have watched these debates and hoped that the government would do something regarding the problems with fireworks. Ministers from all over the uk have received a vast amount of complaints regarding the problems fireworks cause but yet again nothing is done about it. Please can someone take control and address the problem.
attributes.background: Rules & regulations regarding fireworks need putting in place. You have had government debates upon debates but nothing has changed. In November 2026 our animals / livestock will suffer again. You have had so many people sign petitions regarding fireworks but yet again we get ignored.

rejection.details:
We understand that you want to see fireworks regulated, but we're not exactly sure what regulations you'd like to see. You may wish to sign some of these petitions which are currently open: 

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766448
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/755713
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750155
